name: curated-catalogue
description: Curated index of third-party Claude Code plugins — one entry per source type for reference

plugins.name: github-pinned-tag
plugins.description: Plugin at the top of a GitHub repo, pinned to a release tag

plugins.name: github-pinned-sha
plugins.description: Same shape, pinned to an immutable commit SHA

plugins.name: non-github-git
plugins.description: Plugin hosted on GitLab (or any git server)

plugins.name: monorepo-subdir
plugins.description: Plugin living in a subdirectory of a monorepo

plugins.name: npm-package
plugins.description: Plugin distributed as an npm package, pinned via semver range

plugins.name: npm-private-registry
plugins.description: Same as above but from a private registry
